items.markdown:
A **shared mailbox** is a single email address (like `info@` or `support@` ) that multiple team members can access to read and send messages. It acts as a central hub for team collaboration, eliminating the need to forward emails or CC coworkers.[](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/email/about-shared-mailboxes?view=o365-worldwide) [[1]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/email/about-shared-mailboxes?view=o365-worldwide)[[2]](https://www.godaddy.com/en-ph/help/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-20081)[[3]](https://www.zoho.com/teaminbox/articles/what-is-a-shared-mailbox.html)[[4]](https://cirasync.com/blog-articles/shared-mailbox/)

Key Benefits

- **Consistent Identity:** When a team member replies to an email, the response appears to come from the shared address rather than an individual's personal email.[](https://www.godaddy.com/en-ph/help/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-20081) [[1]](https://www.godaddy.com/en-ph/help/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-20081)[[2]](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/about-shared-mailboxes-shared-folders-and-shared-calendars-in-outlook-3ed70138-6143-4404-9cc6-b7a23e8a4278)
- **No Separate License Required:** In platforms like Microsoft 365, the shared mailbox itself usually does not require a paid license, though individual users accessing it must be licensed.[](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/email/about-shared-mailboxes?view=o365-worldwide) [[1]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/email/about-shared-mailboxes?view=o365-worldwide)[[2]](https://missiveapp.com/compare/office-365-shared-mailbox)
- **Shared Workspace:** It often includes a communal calendar and contact list, making it ideal for tracking team shifts, events, or shared client contacts.[](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-456cb9e6-cd3e-4873-9d23-8ab9296cf939) [[1]](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-456cb9e6-cd3e-4873-9d23-8ab9296cf939)[[2]](https://www.godaddy.com/en-ph/help/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-20081)[[3]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/email/create-a-shared-mailbox?view=o365-worldwide)
- **Visibility:** Team members can see when an email has been read or responded to, ensuring customer inquiries don't fall through the cracks.[](https://cirasync.com/blog-articles/shared-mailbox/) [[1]](https://cirasync.com/blog-articles/shared-mailbox/)[[2]](https://help.mailbutler.io/help/what-is-a-shared-inbox-and-how-do-i-set-it-up)

How It Works

- **No Direct Login:** A shared mailbox does not have its own username or password. Instead, an IT administrator grants designated users "Full Access" or "Send As" permissions.[](https://www.coreview.com/blog/how-to-create-a-shared-mailbox-in-microsoft-365) [[1]](https://www.coreview.com/blog/how-to-create-a-shared-mailbox-in-microsoft-365)[[2]](https://www.godaddy.com/en-ph/help/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-20081)
- **Seamless Integration:** Once you are granted access, the shared mailbox automatically appears alongside your personal inbox in email clients like Outlook.[](https://www.coreview.com/blog/how-to-create-a-shared-mailbox-in-microsoft-365) [[1]](https://www.coreview.com/blog/how-to-create-a-shared-mailbox-in-microsoft-365)[[2]](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/about-shared-mailboxes-shared-folders-and-shared-calendars-in-outlook-3ed70138-6143-4404-9cc6-b7a23e8a4278)
- **Sent Items Tracking:** Replies sent from the shared mailbox are typically saved in the shared "Sent Items" folder, allowing the whole team to see what communications have gone out.[](https://cirasync.com/blog-articles/shared-mailbox/) [[1]](https://cirasync.com/blog-articles/shared-mailbox/)

You can read more about how to set up and manage these inboxes on the [![](https://encrypted-tbn3.gstatic.com/faviconV2?url=https://support.microsoft.com&client=AIM&size=128&type=FAVICON&fallback_opts=TYPE,SIZE,URL)
⁠Microsoft Support Guide for Shared Mailboxes](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-456cb9e6-cd3e-4873-9d23-8ab9296cf939).[[1]](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/what-is-a-shared-mailbox-456cb9e6-cd3e-4873-9d23-8ab9296cf939)[[2]](https://help.mailbutler.io/help/what-is-a-shared-inbox-and-how-do-i-set-it-up)[[3]](https://www.alwaysbeyond.com/blog/shared-mailboxes-in-microsoft-365-what-they-are-and-how-to-use-them)

expanded_element.featured_title: Using a licensed mailbox for shared access introduces several drawbacks:
expanded_element.title: Outlook: Shared Mailbox Use Cases and Benefits - Ithaca College
expanded_element.description:
Higher Costs: Each licensed mailbox incurs a monthly fee.
Security Risks: Shared credentials can lead to unauthorized access.
Complex Management: Managing passwords and/or DUO access for multiple users is inefficient.
